decision.reasoning_trace: The consideration set was formed by selecting the top 5 products with the highest ratings and most reviews. The final choice, 'prod_running_shoes_177', was selected due to its high rating of 4.7 and large number of reviews (12057), indicating a high level of customer satisfaction and reliability. Additionally, the product is from a well-known brand (Brooks) and has a high price point ($149.91), suggesting a high-quality product.
